mapper.sql: SELECT o.*, g.title AS goods_title, g.images AS goods_images, b.nickname AS buyer_nickname, s.nickname AS seller_nickname FROM trade_order o JOIN goods g ON o.goods_id = g.goods_id JOIN sys_user b ON o.buyer_id = b.user_id JOIN sys_user s ON o.seller_id = s.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trade_order(order_no, goods_id, buyer_id, seller_id, amount, delivery_type, address, status) VALUES(#{orderNo}, #{goodsId}, #{buyerId}, #{sellerId}, #{amount}, #{deliveryType}, #{address}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE trade_order SET status = #{status} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE trade_order SET status = 2, finish_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 1
